text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Fan Fest, an event where Umamusume fans
gather at Tracen Academy, is just around the
corner.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan's dream is to put a smile on everyone's
face? That's so wonderful!

text_block_list.name: Daiwa Scarlet
text_block_list.text:
You're her trainer, so could we talk to you about
something? We might know of an opportunity to
make her dream come true...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Having heard their proposal, I give them the
go-ahead without hesitation. And so...

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whaaa? You want me to perform on the main
stage during the Fan Fest?!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yes! The title of the show is "Kitasan Black, Sing
Your Heart Out"!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
It'll be a two-part special performance, and we
want you to take center stage!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer? What do you think?
choice_data_list: Congrats on the lead role, Kitasan!
Congrats on the lead role, Kitasan!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Aw, thanks! It's an honor to be the lead! I... I'll do
my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Being able to entertain fans outside of the
racecourse is an important task. I want her to do
the best she can and make her dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: The day of the event...

text_block_list.name: Vodka
text_block_list.text:
Aaall right! You guys ready?! We're starting
things off right with a race!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
This dream race is one you won't usually get to
see anywhere else, so make sure you don't miss a
second of it!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And so, the eight contestants enter the gates...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clang!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Raaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan?! I can't believe you're challenging me
right out the gate... And what speed...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Well, well... You barely even counted as a small
fry last year, but look at you go now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As time passed, Kitasan Black's running has
improved, and now, she's able to compete on
equal footing with the upperclassmen.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Next up, we have a concert! Getting to sing so
many songs in front of everyone feels like a
dream!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: YEEEAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Okay, here I go! Let's kick it off with a little
opening!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa!
Whoa, whoa, whoa, whoa!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: It's time for us to meet at laaaast! ♪

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha... Kita's really pulling out all the stops,
huh?
choice_data_list: Well, that's part of her charm!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan Black belts out song after song in her
signature enka singing style.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Goal after goal, forever winniiiiing the soooul! ♪

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
The extinctive need for speeed! Burning hotter
with every rival I beeeat!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
H-her singing style is so unique! I don't think I'll
ever listen to the song the same way again.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Did she just get that line slightly wrong, though?
For a second, I got this freaky image of an
asteroid hurtling toward the Earth...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The whole concert ends up clocking out at two
and a half hours. Kitasan Black and the others
manage to successfully complete the show.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(We've made so many people happy. They're all
smiling so much...)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(This is it. This is the very thing I've always wanted
to do!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
(Running, singing, coming together as one, and
getting everyone fired up!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: (I want to do this forever and ever. Except... I wanna do it for real, not just at this festival!)

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you so much, everyone! Thank youuu!

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the show is over, Kitasan Black leaves the
stage.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Thank you so much for coming today! May I shake
your hand as thanks? Really, thank you so much.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I hope you'll come watch us race in person! We'll
be just as incredible on the track as we were here
during today's event!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't believe she's saying goodbye to each
person individually... She's treating this Fan Fest
more seriously than anyone else.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
She's amazing, isn't she? No, she's more than
that...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: It might simply be in her blood.
choice_data_list: What do you mean by that?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Distinguished families such as mine don't remain
distinguished for no reason. We feel a calling to
honor our forebearers—you could say it runs in
our blood. Similarly...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Kitasan has her own family and her own blood
flowing through her veins. Hers drives her do
everything she can to make people happy.

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much! Thank you, thank you!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Watching Kitasan Black sincerely thank every
single fan without rest, I begin to realize the truth
behind Mejiro McQueen's observation.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her desire to make everyone happy is what
connects her to the next race and the one after
that.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Once the show is over, Kitasan Black goes outside
the venue to see the fans off.

text_block_list.name: Fans
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Why are there still so many people
around?! Don't tell me nobody's left yet!

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for today, Kitasan Black! We had a lot of
fun!

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
We've been waiting for you to come out! All right,
everyone! Now that the main star is here, let's
give her a final round of applause!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Trainer, what's going on here?
choice_data_list: It looks like everyone's a huge fan of yours!
It looks like everyone's a huge fan of yours!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Slowly but surely, Kitasan Black has taken root in
the people's hearts, and because of that...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
An ocean of people now floods the area outside
the venue. Her innate personality and charisma
have endeared her to the masses.

text_block_list.name: Fan C
text_block_list.text:
Congratulations on the success of today's
performance! Come on, everyone! Let's give her a
hand!

text_block_list.name: Fan D
text_block_list.text: To Kitasan Black's future success! Yeaaah!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The sound of lively clapping reverberates through
the air. But that's not all.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Peeew... Boom, boom, boom!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: Fireworks?! Did you do all this just for me?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe. Kitasan is so well-liked...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
In the beginning, hardly anyone paid attention to
Kitasan Black, but now, she has so many people
rooting for her success.

text_block_list.name: Fan E
text_block_list.text:
You've got this, Kitasan! Show us a dream come
true this spring!

text_block_list.name: Fan F
text_block_list.text: Kitasan, you've gotta win, all right?

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text: I will! Thank you, everyone! I won't let you down!

text_block_list.name: Kitasan Black
text_block_list.text:
I still have a long way to go, and I'm nowhere near
good enough yet, but I hope you'll all stay with
me until the very end and beyond!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Clap, clap, clap, clap!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The rapturous applause and cheering show no
signs of letting up. The event is a grand success,
and Umamusume and fans alike are able to thank
each other.
